translations.welcome.gettingstarted: Start with a post, or use the links below to connect accounts, review your timeline, and more.
translations.welcome.tagline: Publish and schedule content across your social channels from one place.
translations.welcome.section.quickstart.subtitle: Common places to go after signing in.
translations.welcome.card.timeline.hint: See drafts, scheduled posts, and publishing history.
translations.welcome.card.social.hint: Connect and manage the profiles you post to.
translations.welcome.card.calendar.hint: View what is scheduled and when.
translations.welcome.card.media.hint: Upload images and files to use in posts.
translations.welcome.card.feed.hint: Browse recent activity from connected accounts.
translations.section.postbox.title: Post
translations.section.postbox.intro: Post a message for the world to see.
translations.section.media.upload.label: Add files
translations.section.login.title: Login
translations.section.login.description: Please enter your username and password to login.
translations.section.login.error: Login failed. Please check your username and password.
